message:
fix(codegen): Add unreachable emission and exception attr return types

Phase 6 & 6b fixes for try-except handling:

- Add stmtListAlwaysTerminates() to detect when try body and all handlers
  always terminate (raise/return), enabling unreachable emission after catch
- Emit unreachable; after catch block when code paths are exhaustive
- Unconditionally emit runtime.discard() for hoisted parameters to prevent
  unused parameter errors when code becomes unreachable
- Add exception attribute detection (__traceback__, __cause__, __context__)
  in signature.zig to use PyValue return type for functions accessing them

Also includes tuple/list unpacking support in findWrittenVarsInStmts and
with statement variable handling in findLocallyDeclaredVars.

Fixes get_tb "implicitly returns" error and maintains 7/7 core tests passing.
